title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having left an admirable record in the Twinkle
Series, Admire Vega has completed the
all-important first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Take as many photos as you
desire! Don't be shy! Yes, yes, yes!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Excuse me, Opera O. Could you maybe
try to look a little more... modest?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-whaagh! I-I'll... I'll try to do my very
best!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Doto, your eyes! I haven't used the flash yet, so
could you open them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Is this the kind of pose you're looking for? Okay,
go ahead!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: Yes! That's wonderful! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega is being interviewed for a special
article titled "A Fierce Four-Way Showdown
Between Rivals!"

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you're last, Admire Vega. If you'd be so
kind...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
I'll be taking photos during your interview, but try
not to worry about the camera. Just relax and talk
like you usually do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Ayabe is so composed even when
surrounded by so many cameras... Amazing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, perhaps I should try playing a cool and
reserved character once in a while. Yes... I am
inspired!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Can you two keep it down a little bit? Ayabe is in
the middle of her interview!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You all have wonderful chemistry. Do you
spend a lot of time together outside of school
and training?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not really, no.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I'd never have guessed! Well, how about
during school, like in class activities and such?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Pretty much never. Opera O and Doto are in a
different year from me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Top Road and I are classmates, so I guess we
speak a little more because of that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Otherwise, I'm usually on my own.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: They just insist on not leaving me alone in races.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But... that's also the reason for some of the
victories I've had.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's at least... how I like to think of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You must be done reading it by now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Can we start training already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My days together with Admire Vega won't end
here.
